name: Corned Beef and Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Place onions in the crockpot.
2. Trim away any fat from the corned beef brisket. If needed, cut the brisket to fit into the crockpot; place it on top of the onions.
3. In a bowl, combine apple juice, brown sugar, orange peel, prepared mustard, and cloves.
4. Pour the mixture over the brisket.
5. Place cabbage on top of the brisket.
6. Cover; cook on low setting for 10 to 12 hours or high setting for 5 to 6 hours.
